programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep07
programme.desc: Didi & Friends datang ke kebun untuk mencabut lobak gergasi. Xixi berkongsi cerita ayahnya sangat cekal dan bersemangat dalam menghasilkan tanaman lobak terbaik.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep08
programme.desc: Didi & Friends terlepas feri untuk ke festival muzik. Pak Atan melancarkan belon dan membawa mereka terbang ke Pulau Muzik. Tiba-tiba penerbangan mereka diganggu seekor helang besar.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep09
programme.desc: Dalam perjalanan ke festival muzik, Pak Atan berasa geram dengan pemandu yang membuang sampah tanpa henti ke luar kenderaan. Pak Atan ingin menegur pemandu yang tidak bertanggungjawab itu.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep10
programme.desc: Didi & Friends akhirnya tiba di festival muzik. Mereka semua teruja untuk menonton konsert. Ketika keluarga beruang sedang membuat persembahan, Aera tiba-tiba hilang.

programme.title: Didi & Friends: Kembara Muzikal Ep11
programme.desc: Lelaki misteri yang sering mengikuti Aera rupa-rupanya pengawal peribadi Aera. Didi & Friends rasa ditipu oleh Aera sepanjang perjalanan mereka. Dapatkan mereka menyelesaikan salah faham antara mereka?

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep02
programme.desc: Dunia impian seterusnya membawa Didi dan kawan-kawannya ke sekolah sebagai pekerjaan cikgu. Nana sedar bahawa tugas cikgu bukan hanya mengajar, tetapi juga membantu murid yang dalam kesusahan.

programme.title: Super Wings S7: Super Pets Adventure Ep10
programme.desc: The Super Wings are upping their saving game with incredible new powers and equipment to become heroic protectors and defenders. They become World Guardians!

programme.title: Robocar POLI S5 Ep02
programme.desc: New friends visit to Brooms Town! Who is the drone losing his memory in the storm and landing on the beach? Tintin, a heavy vehicle who wears glasses and has large pincer fingers.

programme.title: Super Wira Ep05
programme.desc: Aman dan Irena berlatih untuk menjadi lebih kuat. Kapten Gemilang menyesali apa yang dia lakukan kepada ayah Roy. Dengan kuasa baru, Roy berjumpa dengan Seri Gumum sekali lagi.

programme.title: Dee The Series Ep08
programme.desc: Dee,bersama ibunya,Amy dan adiknya Mia memulakan hidup baru di Kuala Lumpur apabila Amy mendapat kerja baru di sebuah kolej swasta. Bermulalah satu dunia yang baru untuk Dee di kolej tersebut yang penuh dengan muzik, gelak ketawa dan air mata.

programme.desc: 'You and I are one and the same. Unleash your imagination!" When the mystic light emerging from Yuma's hand & his power of imagination fuses him with the light and he transforms into Ultraman Arc.

programme.title: Jutawan Ekspres 2 Trailer
programme.desc: Keluarga Yunoh dan Yusni kembali lagi dengan Bedak Magik yang sepatutnya menyelamatkan mereka dari kemiskinan. Namun cabaran baru telah bermula buat keluarga yang penuh huru hara ini.

programme.title: Mechamato Series Season 3 Ep10
programme.desc: Walaupun semakin ramai robot dan alien jahat baharu yang muncul di Kota Hilir, Amato dan MechaBot merasakan bahawa khidmat mereka tidak lagi diperlukan sejak kemunculan semula adiwira Maskmana.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Dream Jobs Ep01
programme.desc: Didi dan kawan-kawannya bertemu Prof Gogo yang memperkenalkan Kad Cita-Cita Impian. Apabila Jojo meletakkan kad angkasawan, mereka terus masuk ke dunia angkasa dan perlu menyelesaikan misi.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep03

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep04
programme.desc: Akar menjalar terus membesar menutupi perpustakaan magikal. Sementara itu, Didi dan Jojo bertemu dengan Beruang si penggembala yang suka meminta tolong kerana kebosanan. Tiba-tiba, Serigala muncul.

programme.title: Didi & Friends Story Time Ep05
programme.desc: Aera terus membaca ketika akar perlahan-lahan merayap ke dalam perpustakaan. Sementara itu, Didi, Nana dan Jojo membina rumah, tetapi sebaik sahaja siap, Serigala tiba-tiba muncul di hadapan mereka.

programme.desc: Ramlah is finally found and Faris joins forces with the company to remove Hanum from power. Izara manipulates Rayhana into blaming herself for the stabbing incident.

Jannah motivates Riz to start a business and Riz tries to solicit invest

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara - EP 23
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 10
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: Wira Kita - EP 4
programme.desc: While many have jumped on the bandwagon of being environmentally-conscious, the heroes' featured in this episode have gone beyond the usual reduce, reuse and recycle mantra to actively care for the environment. Find out how their contributions affect the world we live in.

programme.title: Uncle Bos Mama - EP 2
programme.desc: Fish is fired by Joshua, who blames her for the closure of Kuaci Media. At the same time, Haidir’s mother disapproves of Fish as Haidir’s choice of partner and starts introducing him to women online in the hope that he will move on from her.

programme.title: Dendam Aurora - EP 34

programme.desc: While capturing a sick robot, MechaBot becomes infected with the Memorino Virus, causing him to lose his memories. Now, Amato must find a way to cure MechaBot before he forgets everything, including their friendship.

programme.title: Siapa Master? - EP 8
programme.desc: This week is all about street food around the world. From mouth-watering pakoras to falafel burgers to beef enchiladas, theyre sure to tantalise your tastebuds.

programme.title: Dendam Seorang Madu - EP 25
programme.desc: Izara’s attempts to humiliate and exploit Rayhana spark Faris’s anger. After losing everything, Hanum turns to her biological child for help.

programme.title: I Love You, Stupid - EP 11
programme.desc: Feeling responsible for the incident at the market the day before, Firman agrees to Iris' request to explore Ijora.

programme.title: Kosmopolitan - EP 7
programme.desc: The tension between Myra and her father surmounts. Alfie still hopes that Myra will call off her wedding. Alfie who is facing more difficulties paying his debts, begins working for Rima. Baharudin offers Riz to work in his company but Riz adamantly refuses because of a family secret. Riz who is more worried about his future meets Jannah more often. This makes Hazwan more concerned, in addition to

programme.title: Tekan Minyak 2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Nadiah, Leena and Aini try to give Rahimah support but are unsure how to do it. Milah and Arif on the other hand notice that Suriati has changed.

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara - EP 24
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Hamparan Asia - EP 6
programme.desc: Insight – Asia’s Changing Middle Class: China : With over 400 million, China’s middle class is larger than the population of the US. Yet, they are tightening their purse strings. Will middle-class Chinese continue to drive consumption and growth?

programme.title: Uncle Bos Mama - EP 3
programme.desc: A school bully targets Shairil once again, prompting Lala to take matters into her own hands by confronting him. As if Fish’s struggles were not already overwhelming, Josh accuses her of lying about her marital status during her job application, further complicating her situation.

programme.title: Dendam Aurora - EP 35
programme.desc: Suriya meets Haikal in search of information about Harris. Aurora uncovers new details about Dr. Azzam and her mother’s past, while Michael turns to Octavia’s family for help rebuilding his business.

programme.title: Mechamato S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: While capturing a sick robot, MechaBot becomes infected with the Memorino Virus, causing him to lose his memories. Now, Amato must find a way to cure MechaBot before he forgets everything, including their friendship.

programme.title: Siapa Master? - EP 9
programme.desc: Part 1 of the Fusion series, this week Chef Syed and Danial will be making Lontong goreng using a very unique ingredient, Lemak chilli padi duck puff and Stuffed Dutch oven Dinner rolls.

programme.title: Dendam Seorang Madu - EP 26
programme.desc: Akif and Syaza grow closer as their relationship deepens. Rayhana agrees to Izara’s demands and resigns from the company to remain close to her mother, Ramlah.

programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Cheap Thrills - EP 3
programme.desc: Syafa and Pink Azwan explore nearly the entire peninsula of Malaysia in search of suitable healing places and visit locations where we can shop for timeless goods.

programme.title: Chill & Healing S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: The host will do the usual activities that are done during holidays, such as shopping at places that have traditional characteristics of the city, relaxing in a popular or viral place, taking pictures, and going sightseeing in iconic locations of the area.

programme.title: Kami TV
programme.desc: The story follows two close friends since their college days and now the founders of the digital platform Kami TV. Their bonds takes a tiwst into a three-way romance when a girl enters their lives.

programme.desc: Saksikan Diari Kemanusiaan Jariah, amalan tanpa sempadan. Bersama pengacara, Anwar Afiq menjejak dan menemu ramah insan-insan hebat yang terlibat dengan misi-misi kemanusiaan. programme.title: World Around Us
programme.desc: World Around Us is a compilation news program, which brings together content material in the form of features and human interest from ASEAN countries and around the world.

programme.title: Behind The Mic
programme.desc: 'Behind The Mic' is an interview program by a radio channel broadcast to a television platform that discusses a wide range of current issues both locally and internationally, including culture, health, education, and much more. programme.desc: Menyapu Balutan -: Tajuk ini akan membahaskan tentang konsep rukhsah dalam syariat Islam, maksud dan dalil menyapu balutan, cara mengangkat hadas dalam keadaan anggota berwudhuk berbalut.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep03
programme.desc: Tajuk Makanan Halal Lagi Baik ini membincangkan tentang kita dituntut untuk mengambil makanan yang halal lagi baik. Untuk memperkembangkan lagi topik ini, murid diperjelaskan dengan maksud makanan halal dan makanan haram. Selain itu, topik ini juga menerangkan tentang akibat pengambilan makanan yang haram kepada rohani dan jasmani serta perbezaan ciri-ciri makanan halal dan makanan haram. Di samp

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Syariah Islamiah Ting. 4 Ep02

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 4 Ep01
programme.desc: Rancangan ini membincangkan tentang kepentingan berdakwah, kupasan surah Fussilat (surah 41, ayat 33), menyelusuri gelombang dakwah semasa para anbiya hingga kini Tuntutan beramal soleh dan berbangga menjadi muslim turut dibincangkan.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Topik ini menerangkan tentang pengertian jahiliah. Diperincikan hal kejahilan dalam bidang akidah dan akhlak serta pelbagai pegangan akidah yang dianuti oleh masyarakat jahiliyah. Kejahilan masyarakat Arab ini masih wujud dan ada di antaranya masih diamalkan sehingga sekarang. Murid murid dikehendaki meninggalkan akhlak buruk yang terdapat dalam masyarakat sekarang yang mirip kejahilan masyarakat

programme.desc: Terjaga dari koma, Syafiq tidak lagi mengingati apa yang berlaku kepadanya. Isterinya, Mariam menjemputnya dari hospital. Syafiq diserang dan dilihat oleh isterinya, selepas itu seorang demi seorang penjenayah mula mati...

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties

Unable to take the loneliness anymore, she opens a doorway to the spirit world to reconnect with her late husband. In doing so, she inadvertently awakens the tormented ghosts of the mansion's previous owner and the maids.

But the threatening campaign of terror continues, even as Ji-Won unravels the mystery behind the phone.

programme.title: The Room
programme.desc: Ron is a travelling salesman who is superstitious. Each time he stays in a new hotel room, he would perform all steps needed to avoid offending any spirits, such as knocking the door and politely greeting the room before entering it. He would also cover any mirror that faces the bed. Yet, when he returns from a late-night dinner, the room still feels eerily strange.

programme.desc: Xiao Cheng falsely claims that he is dating Cheng Qing after being intimidated by Situ Jiu, causing Cheng Qing to worry about the misunderstanding. Ouyang Zong joins Jia Ming's cello class, hinting that he may have a hidden agenda.

programme.title: Every Body Knows S3 - EP 10 / 医聊大小事 S3
programme.desc: Are processed foods as harmful as we think? A nutritionist explains how they affect health, what to watch out for on labels, and how to make smarter food choices in daily life.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 16 / 前线追踪
programme.desc: Frontline is a weekly investigative current affairs programme that aims to address issues closest to the hearts of Singaporeans.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 15 / 至死不渝
programme.desc: Hongtao is suspected of inciting murder after police find evidence in his home. Shiyuan provides a recording revealing Jialin as the mastermind. Keying suspects Shuheng is emotionally scarred, and Dr. Su offers to help. Shuheng recalls how Jialin humiliated Wanqing while Hongtao coldly stood by. After Hongtao is released, Shuheng punches him.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 300
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 312
programme.desc: A premium, natural supplement trusted globally for over 20 years. It helps to manage cholesterol to a healthy level by combining Red Yeast Rice (Monacolin K) with high-activity Nattokinase. Enhanced with Dan Shen and Wild Yam, it helps to support vessel elasticity and reduces heart workload. It is toxin-free and safe for long-term daily use. You could claim a full refund if you do not see results

programme.title: The Demon Hunter's Romance - EP 10 / 无忧渡
programme.desc: In Guangping City, where humans and demons coexist, Ban Xia, a wealthy girl with the rare ability to see demons' true forms, is deemed delusional by her family. programme.title: The Legend of Heroes - Hot Blooded - EP 23 / 金庸武侠世界之铁血丹心
programme.desc: The foolish young lad, Guo Jing, ultimately matures into a national hero who stands for the country and the people, embodying the true essence of chivalry.

programme.title: Super Dad - EP 14 / 男神不败
programme.desc: Ling Zhi and Chloe met with a car accident and their lives are at stake. Wei Hao is close to breaking down. He immediately rushes down to Zheng Yi's place to ask for the box of chocolates and manages to successfully go back in time to save his wife and daughter. However, he enters a coma thereafter and dreams of himself walking through the netherworld, even seeing his old-aged self...

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1994/95 group stage tie between Barcelona and Manchester United at the Nou Camp. Johan Cruyff's 'Dream Team' featured Hristo Stoichkov and Romario.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1998/99 UEFA Champions League group stage epic between Man Utd and Barcelona at Old Trafford. This end-to-end game featured six goals, two penalties and a red card.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1999/00 group stage tie between Dick Advocaat's Rangers and PSV at Ibrox. Spearheaded by Ruud van Nistelrooy, the visitors arrived unbeaten in their domestic league.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the thrilling 2001/02 UEFA Champions League group stage clash between Arsenal and Bayer Leverkusen at Highbury. A tough group also included Deportivo and Juventus.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the epic 2003/04 UEFA Champions League group stage clash between Monaco and Deportivo at the Stade Louis II, featuring 11 goals in total, with one player scoring four.
